description_long: This is a modern, boxy SUV with a robust and angular design, reminiscent of luxury off-road vehicles. The body is predominantly white with black accents, including the roof, window trim, and spare tire cover mounted on the rear door. The vehicle features large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with a polished metallic finish, and tinted windows for privacy. The front grille is wide and rectangular, flanked by square headlights and a prominent bumper, while the rear showcases a spare tire and detailed tailgate. The SUV has four passenger doors and a sunroof, indicating a premium, urban-oriented model. The overall appearance suggests a high-end, durable vehicle suitable for both city and rugged environments.
description: A boxy, white luxury SUV with black accents, large alloy wheels, and a rear-mounted spare tire. Features include tinted windows, a sunroof, and a robust, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing four doors, large alloy wheels, black window trim, and a sunroof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire cover, tailgate details, and rear lights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, showing the passenger side doors and wheels.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide grille, square headlights, and prominent bumper.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke alloy rims with a polished metallic finish
